FROTH threshold now BREACHED (15K MM-net) — asymmetric capitulation edge compressing; size-up window closing

deployment_plan.revision_note: size_inr corrected to match pct_envelope; envelope unchanged; tranche % unchanged
deployment_plan.v32_respec_log_260531: COT-gate ambiguity resolved by operator 260531: T2/T3 'COT MM <=0' re-spec'd from literal net-short to WASHED-OUT-POSITIONING spirit (DICTIONARY COT-THRESHOLD-LADDER: low-percentile / below COT-CASCADE-DONE / W-W not crowding). Currently MET (+10.1K, froth-closed) — but does NOT fire T2/T3 today; price gates them ($75-76 above the $65-72 zones). The COT leg simply stops being a near-impossible blocker for when price arrives.
deployment_plan.strategic_finding_260531: PRIMARY LIVE RISK = UNDER-DEPLOYMENT. The ladder was built to deploy into a cascade to $65-69 that the 260531 re-weight now judges LESS likely (silver holding $75-76; macro/COT/metals supportive; lower-floor thesis weakening; V-13 reaffirmed). T1.5 (Rs.10L, CLEARED-but-HELD) is the partial hedge. OPEN OPERATOR DECISION: whether to add a RE-SPECIFIED HIGHER-ENTRY TRANCHE (deploy some at/near current $75-76) rather than wait for a dip that may not come. Not yet specified — operator call.
deployment_plan.envelope_basis: 25% of active book through Jun FOMC; extends to 35%-of-active (17.5L) post-Warsh-dovish-signal
